LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BERTA CARTER'S MOTION FOR COURT ENFORCEMENT OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. ARGUED AND SUBMITTED. THE COURT ORDERS THAT DEFENDANT IS TO CONVEY REAL PROPERTY AT ISSUE TO PLAINTIFF BY APRIL 6, 2007. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT INCLUDING THAT THE DEFENDANT IS TO CONTINUE MAKING PAYMENTS ON THE MORTGAGE. PLAINTIFF WILL BE ASSESSED $100 FROM MAY 31, 2006 THROUGH AUGUST 15, 2006. MATTER CONTINUED TO JUNE 8, 2007. MR. SANDOVAL IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
